items.title: Jeff Teague says Jaylen Brown got ROBBED of All-NBA 1st team | Club 520 x Celtics
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen react to Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown being left off the First-Team All-NBA roster, and the guys all agree that he got robbed, and that he should have made it. Jeff says that JB should have made it over Luka Doncic of the Los Angeles Lakers,…

items.title: 2 more Jalen Johnson stats...
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
2 more Jalen Johnson stats...

5th player in NBA history to average at least 22 points, 10 rebounds, and 7 assists in a season, joining Big O, Wilt, Jokic, and Westbrook.

Also became the 1st Hawk ever to be top-20 in the NBA in points, rebounds, and assists in the same season.

items.title: 2025-26 All-NBA teams:
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt:
2025-26 All-NBA teams:

First: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic, Victor Wembanyama, Luka Doncic, Cade Cunningham

Second: Jaylen Brown, Kawhi Leonard, Kevin Durant, Jalen Brunson, Donovan Mitchell

Third: Tyrese Maxey, Jamal Murray, Jalen Johnson, Jalen Duren, Chet Holmgren

items.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.

Johnson averaged 22.5 points, 10.3 rebounds (7th in NBA), and 7.9 assists (5th in NBA) per game.

Johnson joins Nikola Jokic as 1 of only 2 players to finish in the top 8 in both rebounds and assists.

items.title: Nikola Jokic with an eighth-straight All-NBA Team nod, makes a sixth First Team. He and David Thompson (twice) are the lone players in Nuggets history to earn a First Team All-NBA honor.

items.body_excerpt: Nikola Jokic with an eighth-straight All-NBA Team nod, makes a sixth First Team. He and David Thompson (twice) are the lone players in Nuggets history to earn a First Team All-NBA honor.

items.title: There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:

LeBron James
Michael Jordan
Jerry West
Stephen Curry
Nikola Jokić
Giannis Antetokounmpo
Jalen Brunson

(via DJ Zullo)
#NBA

items.title: KSE has always taken the view that spending that doesn't net direct return isn't worth it.
items.author: Hardwood Paroxysm
items.body_excerpt:
KSE has always taken the view that spending that doesn't net direct return isn't worth it. 

They clearly view the luxury tax the same way and it might mean the end of contention for Nikola Jokic.

items.title: Yes.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Yes. 
Giannis Antetokounmpo IS the only answer teams can get, considering the Nuggets prez said Nikola Jokić is untouchable.

Which goes back to the Bucks actually not wanting to win at that level anymore if they do trade him.
